result.finding: validation/longchain_decouple.py vs Yamazaki: at the fixed root-matching carrier (5.5x base), increasing seq 1->10 INFLATES the PFDoDA root 6.94x (root ratio 1.00 -> 6.90) while the shoot over-feed only relaxes (straw 2.27x -> 1.59x). Mechanism: suppressing the mobile pool lowers the internal conc, which RAISES the net uptake gradient, so the bound store grows -- the lever pushes the root the wrong way. PFUnDA corroborates (root inflation 7.41x).
